introSection: Tony's Express is a steel roller coaster built by Italian firm Zamperla currently located at Luna Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Zamperla announced the ride in November 2019 at the IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride was expected to open in 2020.

The ride opened in September 2022.

fullText:
Tony's Express is a steel roller coaster built by Italian firm Zamperla currently located at Luna Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

Zamperla announced the ride in November 2019 at the IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA. The ride was expected to open in 2020.

The ride opened in September 2022.
